item.title: AFL trade talk: St Kilda step up interest in Brisbane premiership hero Sam Marshall, big watch on Jake Stringer
item.description: Four recruiters were watching the out-of-favour midfielder dominate in the VFL.

item.title: Injury carnage as Wallabies confirm halves overhaul
item.description: Flyhalf Declan Meredith will make his Test debut and fullback Jock Campbell has been benched to act as his unlikely back-up against France in Brisbane.

item.title: US President Donald Trump says he is Iran’s top assassination target as fresh strikes launched
item.description: The US president warned he could be the ‘next’ leader killed during the conflict.

item.title: Dr Chris Webster: The man who helped solve heinous Erin Patterson case admits he is now broke and jobless
item.description: He helped solve one of Australia’s biggest crimes. Now, Dr Chris Webster says he has paid the ultimate price.

item.title: Are Vodafone’s mobile plans still a good deal after they got more expensive?
item.description: Vodafone’s postpaid mobile plans have jumped by $5 per month but it has added something to soften the blow.

item.title: Pauline Hanson meets with UK far-right figure Tommy Robinson
item.description: ‘Hopefully the next leader of her nation.’

item.title: Telstra outage: Police investigating death of elderly South Australian after senator Kerrynne Liddle doubles down on triple‑0 claim
item.description: A senator had earlier been accused of causing unnecessary panic by South Australia’s police minister.

item.title: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage left fighting a bin can as the populist leader’s election gamble backfires
item.description: Nigel Farage resigned amid allegations over personal financing. This is his by-election opponent.

item.title: Australians living longer but facing growing chronic disease burden
item.description: The nation’s biggest health check-up reveals we’re spending more of those years living with illness.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Telstra CEO apologises for major outage
item.description: ‘We have let our customers and Australians down... I am sorry for the impact that this has had on so many people.’

item.title: Big Bash League’s ‘unique’ Indian season opener locked in for Chennai: ‘Can’t wait’
item.description: The one-off spectacular will put a struggling franchise in the shop window.

item.title: Centrelink customers warned over scam emails
item.description: Highly convincing messages could catch users unaware. Here’s what to look out for.

item.title: SA Police dismiss triple‑0 outage death claim by Senator Kerrynne Liddle
item.description: ‘It is unfortunate their loved one’s death was placed in the public arena ...when it need not have been.’

item.title: New Supercars leader as Cam Waters wins Townsville sprint, Broc Feeney finishes 10th
item.description: Broc Feeney’s lead at top of the championship standings is gone after a stunning result.

item.title: Twelve killed, including foreign nationals, in one of Spain's deadliest wildfires in Almeria province
item.description: At least 12 people are dead and 23 are missing as firefighters battle the blaze.

item.title: UK police release suspect in the killing of former conservative politician Ann Widdecombe
item.description: The anti-immigration campaigner was found dead with ‘serious injuries’.

item.title: Mark Webber slams speculation over Oscar Piastri future: ‘Nonsense’
item.description: The Aussie manager has had enough and made his thoughts on the matter crystal clear.

item.title: Capital gains tax and negative gearing: First home buyers and investors have their say on government reforms
item.description: Will the controversial changes deliver what they set out to achieve?

item.title: Queensland dad makes life-changing discovery weeks after wife dies from cancer
item.description: ‘One day, you come back home but you come back home without a person.’

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter, Brooke Warne, gets engaged to Alex Heath
item.description: ‘He will be over the moon celebrating.’

item.title: Middle East tensions leave door open for extension of fuel excise cuts
item.description: The discount Aussies are getting at the bowser is due to run out on August 2.

item.title: Toy Story 5 pitches devices against traditional play but expert says age of toys ‘not over’
item.description: The latest film in the cult animated series taps into a ‘modern anxiety’ for parents with a cautionary tale, but are those concerns unnecessarily inflated?

item.title: US expects Iran to issue public statement declaring Strait of Hormuz open
item.description: Commercial shipping through the key route remains severely disrupted.

item.title: Telstra insiders say outage caused by old server that could have been replaced for less than $30,000
item.description: ‘We’ve commenced a full investigation into this incident.’

item.title: The Issue Podcast: Farmer’s dire food shortage warning amid growing fuel and fertiliser pressures
item.description: ‘Imagine if we were short on food, that’s the way we’re heading.’

item.title: Australian man dies in immigration detention in Bali while awaiting deportation
item.description: He had overstayed his visa and was set to be deported when the tragedy unfolded.

item.title: ‘Profound shock’ as South Africa star Jayden Adams dies just days after playing at World Cup
item.description: The 25-year-old won the hearts of his nation when he bravely played at the World Cup only hours after his grandmother’s death.

item.title: Wimbledon champion Linda Noskova pays emotional tribute to late mum after wild final against Karolina Muchova
item.description: There were tears all over Centre Court after two friends rode a rollercoaster that featured a tennis meltdown and ended with a beautiful memory.

item.title: Socceroos’ heartbreak story Jordan Bos shares update from hospital bed after undergoing knee surgery
item.description: The 23-year-old’s fate has finally been revealed after he limped out of the World Cup loss to Egypt.

item.title: Norway’s furious protests ignored as cable drama sends England through to World Cup semis
item.description: FIFA officials were forced to issue a statement before the game was even over after the crucial goal was controversially allowed to stand.

item.title: Aussie UFC veteran Robert Whittaker says ‘Bobby’s still got it’ after bone-crunching first win at light heavyweight
item.description: The former champion’s victim threw in the towel when he ‘immediately reacted like ‘my jaw is broken’’.

item.title: Switzerland’s Breel Embolo ‘distraught’ after red card for embarrassing dive against Argentina
item.description: ‘This is remarkable. I think there’s going to be a lot of people upset with a decision like this in a game of this magnitude.’

item.title: UFC rocked as injured Conor McGregor forced to quit seconds into comeback fight against Max Holloway
item.description: The hype train crashed after the controversial star attempted a ‘crazy’ move to start the fight.

item.title: Michelle Payne shares baby joy in surprise pregnancy announcement
item.description: The 40-year-old shared the ‘little love’ news in a surprise social media post.

item.title: US senator Lindsey ‌Graham dies aged 71
item.description: The one-time critic turned ally of Donald Trump died after a brief and sudden illness.

item.title: Brodie Kostecki dodges early chaos to blitz Supercars victory at Townsville 500
item.description: The DJR star came from behind pole to atone for his frustrations earlier in the weekend.

item.title: Vietnam veteran's long-lost daughter discovered after almost 60 years
item.description: ‘Through me, and through my children, he has left a legacy.’

item.title: Gruesome image shows extent of Rabbitohs star’s sickening injury as Souths celebrate Jai Arrow’s birthday in style
item.description: A graphic photo has revealed a gaping cut that stretches about a foot down the leg of Dayne Jennings.

item.description: The 80-year-old is speaking out to save others from the same heartbreak.

item.title: Bombshell as Brendon McCullum sacked as England Test coach
item.description: The Bazball era appears all but over with the coach following Ben Stokes out the door.

item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.description: Shocking footage circulating online shows the huge blaze raging and plumes of smoke pouring out of the pub’s front door.

item.title: Cruz Hewitt’s ‘special’ run to Wimbledon final ends in heartbreak against Jordan Lee
item.description: The 17-year-old’s disappointment was palpable even as Lleyton and Bec lifted him up after a brilliant week.

item.title: World No.1 Jannik Sinner checks on Alexander Zverev in moment of pure class on his way to Wimbledon win
item.description: The superstar was ruthless on his way to back-to-back titles, but he knew exactly what he had to do when his hurting rival hit the deck.

item.description: ‘We bombed the hell out of them last night.’

item.description: Still waiting for your flying car or robot butler? You’re not alone.

item.description: The Australian dating coach passed away in March after a brave battle with colon cancer.

item.description: This vibrant mango mud crab curry proves native ingredients deserve a place in every Australian kitchen.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Plans for data centre at heart of World Heritage-listed national park scrapped after community outcry
item.description: ‘It’s just hard to wrap my head around why this would be thought to be a suitable location.’

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Four more men charged over alleged kidnapping and murder of Sydney grandfather
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis strike Saudi Arabia’s Abha airport in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport
item.description: Shocking footage published by Houthi-controlled media shows strikes battering Yemen’s airport earlier in the day, ending a period of ‘de-escalation’.

item.title: Axed England coach Brendon McCullum issues apology after ‘tap on the shoulder’
item.description: Brendon McCullum ‘can only say sorry’, but has found a ‘romantic’ silver lining to his sacking.

item.title: Melbourne Storm suffer huge blow as Cameron Munster booked for knee surgery
item.description: Melbourne have taken a huge hit to their finals hopes with just six rounds left in the season.

item.title: Tennis world baffled as Alex de Minaur secretly weds long-time partner Katie Boulter during Wimbledon final
item.description: ‘He really didn’t have much belief he would make the final kind of tells it’s own story.’

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump floats fee on cargo using Strait of Hormuz as ceasefire with Iran sinks
item.description: ‘We’ll become the guardian of the strait ... And we should be reimbursed’.

item.title: Missing piece in Brisbane Broncos’ 2025 premiership photo driving favourite son Billy Walters
item.description: ‘I just want to get another photo like that, but me in playing kit.’

item.title: Much-loved former NRL player Karl Lovell dies after short battle with lung cancer, aged 48
item.description: The devoted father’s former club has revealed one of his final acts of selflessness.

item.title: Anniversary of murdered backpacker Peter Falconio renews heartbreaking plea from family
item.description: His killer took a vital piece of information to the grave.

item.title: Collingwood coach Craig McRae backtracks on famous trade quote about wanting players over picks
item.description: ‘I honestly haven’t spoken about this ever.’

item.title: 2026 Geely EX2: China’s best-selling EV priced for Australia
item.description: The most popular EV in China, Geely's EX2 electric hatch will land here later this month at a lower price than its rivals.

item.title: Worker dies after going overboard from Princess cruise ship
item.description: The ship was mid-voyage when the tragedy occurred.

item.title: Hyundai Santa Fe and Ioniq 6 recalled
item.description: Hyundai is recalling the Santa Fe and Ioniq 6 to fix a defect that may stop their front seatbelts from working properly.

item.title: Norway superstar Erling Haaland returns home from World Cup with stuffed raccoon
item.description: A store in Texas can’t keep up with sudden demand after Erling Haaland made their product go viral.

item.title: Hot honey craze: Nutritionist shares three healthier takes on the viral food trend
item.description: From burgers to pizza, these hot honey recipes put a healthier twist on the viral trend.

item.title: Carlton linked to out-of-favour Geelong star Gryan Miers: ‘One to watch’
item.description: Other clubs believe the premiership player will be ‘on the move’ at the end of the year.

item.title: Origin Energy to refund thousands of customers after ACCC investigation
item.description: ‘Retailers should provide clear and accurate information about their plans to help consumers make informed decisions.’

item.title: Pauline Hanson defends Tommy Robinson meeting in 7NEWS Spotlight interview airing Sunday
item.description: The One Nation leader refuses to apologise in a tense conversation with Liam Bartlett on 7NEWS Spotlight.

item.title: Celebrate Bastille Day with authentic French crêpes and galettes
item.description: French chefs reveal the secrets to perfect crêpes every time.

item.title: Kim Kardashian, Lewis Hamilton: Reality star shares new family pictures with F1 driver boyfriend
item.description: The legendary F1 driver has been romantically linked to the SKIMS founder since February.

item.description: ‘I never told you.’

item.title: Teenage boy fighting for life after school stabbing in Karawatha, Brisbane
item.description: Police confirmed one person had been taken into custody.

item.description: ‘There’s not much room for error.’

item.description: ‘It’s difficult for someone to live with this on their conscience.’

item.description: ‘It might be worth opening it and having a good look before drinking it.’

item.title: Ford Ranger and Everest recalled again
item.description: Ford has issued another recall for a software fault affecting the transmission in Ranger and Everest models produced between 2017 and 2019.

item.title: Wey V8X electric SUV is the next chapter in GWM’s luxury strategy
item.description: One of the next premium Chinese auto brands bound for Australia is about to introduce a new large electric SUV in China.

item.title: Paradise Country Tasmanian devil Mary still recovering after escape into Gold Coast bushland
item.description: Nearly a month after her dramatic rescue, Mary is making progress, but is not fit for the public yet.

item.title: Gold Coast pair Mac Andrew and Jamarra Ugle-Hagan deny any wrongdoing after video circulates
item.description: The duo were investigated after being spotted leaving a disabled toilet together at last week’s State of Origin decider.

item.title: Jarome Luai’s sudden exit confirmed as Benji Marshall slams rumours of relationship breakdown
item.description: ‘I’m a guy who respects respect.’

item.title: Queensland homeowner captures carpet python on door camera
item.description: ‘At the bottom of the camera, it even said it’s a person.’

item.title: West Perth Football Club shattered by death of Anna Keunen, much-loved wife of premiership hero Chris Keunen
item.description: Tributes are flowing for the mother of two who is being remembered as ‘a beautiful person, inside and out’.

item.title: One million Aussies have cancer with under-40s rates rising, Australian Institute of Health and Welfare data shows
item.description: The new data has shown the most common cancers as well as the most deadly.

item.title: Melbourne Demons resigned to ruling out injured veteran Jack Viney for season
item.description: The forgotten veteran has not been seen all season and now the coach has addressed situation.

item.description: Hyundai has reintroduced a flagship Black Ink variant of its new-generation Palisade, though it's pricier than before.

item.title: Crows coach Matthew Nicks defends Josh Worrell following car accident involving pedestrian
item.description: ‘We’re just doing whatever we can to support him.’

item.title: 'ISIS bride' Rayann El Houli allegedly urged kids to be like terrorists, Melbourne Magistrates Court told
item.description: The court was told the 34-year-old showed her children propaganda videos and encouraged them to act like fighters while living in Syria.
